<!-- Page Type: Productnew -->
<!-- Generated by SEOwlsClaw v0.1 | SEO with Owls Claw (See Owls Claw) -->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{TITLE} — {DESCRIPTION}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="{DESCRIPTION_LENGTH_160_chars_max}">
    <link rel="canonical" href="{URL_CANONICAL}">
    
    <!-- Schema: Product -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "Product",
      "name": "{TITLE}",
      "description": "{DESCRIPTION}",
      "brand": "{BRAND_NAME}",
      "offers": {
        "@type": "Offer",
        "priceCurrency": "EUR",
        "price": "{PRICE_CURRENCY_PRICE}",
        "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock"
      },
      "aggregateRating": {
        "@type": "AggregateRating",
        "ratingValue": "{RATING_VALUE}",
        "ratingCount": "{RATING_COUNT}"
      }
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- HERO SECTION -->
    <header class="product-hero">
        <h1>{H1_TITLE_BRAND_PRODUCT_KEYWORD}</h1>
        <p>{HERO_SUBHEADLINE_TECHNICAL_BENEFITS} — Perfect for {TARGET_USE_CASES}</p>
        <span class="price-tag">{DISPLAY_PRICE_EUR} / unit</span>
    </header>

    <!-- DESCRIPTION H2 -->
    <section class="product-description">
        <h2>{H2_DESCRIPTION_OVERVIEW_FEATURES}</h2>
        <p>{DESCRIPTION_CONTENT_400_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        <p>{USE_CASE_BULLET_POINTS}</p>
    </section>

    <!-- TECHNICAL SPECS H3 Section -->
    <section class="technical-specs">
        <h3>{H3_TECHNICAL_SPECS_TITLE_DETAILED}</h3>
        <dl class="specs-list">
            <dt>{SPEC_1_LABEL}</dt><dd>{SPEC_1_VALUE_UNIT}</dd>
            <dt>{SPEC_2_LABEL}</dt><dd>{SPEC_2_VALUE_UNIT}</dd>
            <dt>{SPEC_3_LABEL}</dt><dd>{SPEC_3_VALUE_UNIT}</dd>
            <dt>{SPEC_4_LABEL}</dt><dd>{SPEC_4_VALUE_UNIT}</dd>
        </dl>
    </section>

    <!-- COMPARISON H4 Section -->
    <section class="comparison-table">
        <h4>{H4_COMPARISON_NEW_VERSION_OR_BENEFITS}</h4>
        <table>
            <thead>
                <tr><th>Feature</th><th>Previous Version</th><th>New Model</th></tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td>{COMPARISON_CATEGORAY_1}</td><td>{COMPREV_A}</td><td>{COMPNEW_B}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>{COMPARISON_CATEGORAY_2}</td><td>{COMPREV_C}</td><td>{COMPNEW_D}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </section>

    <!-- CTA H5 Section -->
    <section class="product-cta">
        <h5>{H5_PURCHASE_BUTTON_TEXT_LIMITED_STOCK}</h5>
        <ul class="cta-bullets">
            <li>{BULLET_1_WARRANTY_FREE_OR_GUARANTEE}</li>
            <li>{BULLET_2_SHIPPING_QUICK_DELIVERY}</li>
            <li>{BULLET_3_TECHNICAL_SUPPORT_AVAILABLE}</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="{PURCHASE_LINK}" class="buy-button">{BUY_BUTTON_TEXT_ADD_TO_CART}</a>
    </section>

    <!-- INTERNAL LINKING H6s -->
    <footer class="related-products">
        <h6><a href="/similar-product-page">{RELATED_PRODUCT_TITLE}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="/comparison-vs-competitor">{COMPARE_WITH_COMPETITOR_PAGE}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="/tech-support-guide">{TECH_SUPPORT_LINK}</a></h6>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

<!-- Editing Guide: Change any {PLACEHOLDER} text directly in this file before generation -->
<!-- New products need clear technical specs and comparison tables for SEO authority! -->
